notes: v0.25.0 — DAILY WINS · PVP. New 5-tier reward ladder pinned to the bottom of the lobby's left column. Win ranked PvP matches to unlock 25 PULSE → 120 XP → 1 BOSS KEY → 25 PULSE → 1 BOSS KEY in order. Rewards auto-credit the second the win lands — no claim button. Tiles render three states: locked (dim), CURRENT (pulsing accent halo), CLAIMED (filled + checkmark). Reset is on UTC midnight (server day) with a live HH:MM:SS countdown in the footer. PvP only — practice / boss rush / forfeits don't count. State persists in settings.cfg under [daily].
